close_reason: Fixed two bugs: (1) Queue lease was never released, preventing subsequent dequeue attempts within 5 seconds (2) Stale pointers not cleaned up when updating to future vesting_time. All scheduled/delayed jobs now process correctly.
description: Jobs enqueued with :at or :in options are not being processed after their vesting_time passes. The scanner should pick them up but doesn't seem to. Test shows 4 pending jobs at end when all should be processed.
title: Scheduled/delayed jobs not being processed
